codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements: tracks last_reinforcement timestamp, invalidates after staleness window (30 days), excludes stale memories from retrieval. Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (staleness.rs module, staleness-related methods in separate impl block), comprehensive tests (21 test cases). No blocking issues found.

issues.description: SQL injection risk in update_staleness_status: UUID strings are joined directly into SQL IN clause. While UUIDs are safe, this pattern should use sqlx query binding instead of format!(). Consider using sqlx::query_with.bind() with array or batch approach.

StalenessCheckResult::not_stale() has hardcoded DEFAULT_REINFORCEMENT_INTERVAL_DAYS in should_reinforce calculation instead of using the config's reinforcement_update_interval_days. This means the should_reinforce field may not match config expectations for custom configs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: New staleness configuration keys (staleness_window_days, reinforcement_update_interval_days) added to settings.json but not documented anywhere in .factory/library/architecture.md or mission AGENTS.md. These are important memory system parameters that future developers should know about.
MemoryEntry gained two new fields (last_reinforcement, is_stale) but architecture.md section on swell-memory only mentions 'SqliteMemoryStore - SQLite-based memory' without describing the data model.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: architecture.md has no MemoryEntry field documentation

sharedStateObservations.observation: New staleness module (staleness.rs) exports public functions check_staleness, is_stale_memory, reinforce, etc. but these are not referenced in architecture.md or any library docs. The staleness detection is a key memory system feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: staleness.rs exports 8 public functions plus StalenessConfig and StalenessCheckResult types, none documented in library

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed all documented conventions (async_trait, thiserror, tracing). No deviations from AGENTS.md patterns.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true with no deviations

summary: Feature implementation passes review. All three expected behaviors implemented correctly: last_reinforcement tracking, staleness window enforcement (30 days), and exclusion of stale memories from retrieval. Implementation includes staleness.rs module with comprehensive staleness logic, SqliteMemoryStore integration with reinforce/mark_stale/update_staleness_status methods, and 21 test cases covering all core paths. Two non-blocking code issues identified: potential SQL injection pattern and hardcoded reinforcement interval in StalenessCheckResult. Several knowledge gaps noted where new configuration keys and staleness module should be documented in .factory/library.
